scene.tagline: One selfie. A full scene set.

hero.sub: Type a dream scene — "a day in Dubai," "Tokyo night walk," "opening my first cafe." Get a cohesive photo set of you in it, ready for Instagram and TikTok.
hero.diff: Step into any life you can imagine — and bring back a set of photos to prove you lived it.
hero.trust: Free 4-photo preview. No sign-up to start.

clusters.title: Imagine yourself anywhere
clusters.sub: A few of the scenes people love. Type your own — anything goes.

how.title: Three taps to your set
how.s1d: A clear front-facing photo. We delete it 24h after.
how.s2d: One line — we plan a whole cohesive shoot.
how.s3d: A set of different moments of one story, ready to post.

finalCta.title: See yourself in your dream scene
finalCta.sub: Free preview. No card. A whole set that feels like one shoot.
finalCta.trust: Selfies auto-delete in 24h · No training · Cancel anytime

cinema.sub: Type a dream scene — we generate a whole set of different moments of you living it. A cohesive set, not a single swap.
cinema.hint: Hover any photo to highlight its full set

scenes.title: Not just one photo.
scenes.sub: Pick a direction below — or write your own one-liner. Every set is one cohesive story.

fantasy_role.label: Fantasy
fantasy_role.prompt: Travel back as an ancient general

profession.label: Profession
profession.prompt: Becoming a chef, praised by a master

delete.title: Selfies auto-delete in 24h
delete.sub: We use your photo only to keep the set looking like you — then it's gone.

noTrain.title: Never used to train AI
noTrain.sub: Your face never enters anyone's training data. Period.

encrypted.title: Encrypted end-to-end
encrypted.sub: Stored on private object storage, transmitted over TLS. Nothing shared with third parties.

pricing.title: Start free. Scale when you love it.

upload.title: Start with one selfie
upload.subtitle: A clear, front-facing photo works best. We use it only to keep the set looking like you — then delete it.
upload.faceNoFace: We couldn't find a clear face — try another selfie.
upload.faceMultiple: Looks like more than one person — a solo selfie works best.
upload.confirmOwn: I confirm this is my own photo and I have the right to use it.

describe.title: Describe your dream scene
describe.subtitle: One line is all it takes — we handle the rest.

tone.title: What feeling do you want?
tone.subtitle: Pick a tone — one is marked as a suggestion.

focus.title: What should the set lean into?
focus.subtitle: Tailored to your scene — pick one focus.

clarify.rewriteNotice: Created as an imagined editorial scene.
clarify.translatedNotice: We translated your description to English for best results.
clarify.rejectedBody: We can't create this one as-is. Try one of these similar ideas 👇

review.title: Your shoot, mapped out
review.subtitle: A cohesive set of {count} shots — like one real photo dump.

generating.title: Developing your set
generating.subtitle: Each shot fades in as it's ready.
generating.patience: We trade speed for quality — every frame is rendered until it looks right, not until the clock runs out. Switch to another tab, grab a coffee, take a walk. The work keeps running in the background; come back anytime to find your set waiting.
generating.errorTitle: Hmm, we couldn't get this going

result.title: Your scene set is ready
result.subtitle: A cohesive set that feels like one shoot.
result.subtitlePartial: We only kept the shots that truly look like you.
result.compensation: Used {used} credits · {dropped} shot(s) didn't make it. We refunded you {refunded} credits as compensation. The Double boost is on us.

errors.upload: We couldn't upload that photo. Try another.
errors.tooLarge: That image is over 12MB. Try a smaller one.
errors.invalidType: Please upload a photo (JPG / PNG / HEIC).
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.noCredits: You're out of credits for the full set.
errors.insufficientCredits: Not enough credits — buy a pack or subscribe to continue.

hero.badge: ⚡ The First Starter Built for Vibe Coding
hero.title: Vibe Code Your AI SaaS to Production
hero.description: Turn your everyday photos into cinematic story sets. SceneSelf generates unified, magazine-grade scene albums from a single selfie — no studio, no shoot, no waiting.

modal.title: Get the source code from our course community
modal.description: The full SceneSelf launch kit, generation presets, and companion materials are distributed inside our creator community.
modal.instruction: If you're enrolled, open the course page below in a new tab to access the code, updates, and course resources.

features.title: Everything You Need for Vibe Coding Success
features.subtitle: Stop scheduling photo shoots. Pick a scene, upload a selfie — SceneSelf delivers a coherent album in minutes.

aiOptimized.title: Built for AI-Assisted Development
aiOptimized.description: Perfectly structured for Cursor, Windsurf, and Claude Code. Every file, every component optimized for AI understanding and modification.

zeroPipeline.title: Zero to Production Pipeline
zeroPipeline.description: Authentication, payments, database, deployment - all configured. Just prompt your AI assistant and watch your SaaS come to life.

nonTechnical.title: Non-Technical Founder Friendly
nonTechnical.description: Don't know React from Rails? Doesn't matter. If you can describe your idea clearly, you can ship a SaaS product.

productionGrade.title: Production-Grade from Day One
productionGrade.description: Real users, real payments, real scale. Built on Next.js, PostgreSQL, and Creem - the same stack powering billion-dollar companies.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Pick a cadence that matches how often you want a new scene set.
pricing.description: Every plan unlocks the same complete scene set with watermark removed. Choose weekly for one-off sets, monthly for steady storytelling, or yearly for serial creators.

values.instantAfterPayment: Added instantly after each billing cycle
values.bestForWeekly: Trying SceneSelf for a one-off shoot
values.bestForMonthly: Building a steady visual story month after month
values.bestForYearly: Serial creators publishing weekly across the year

details.watermarkRemoved: Watermark removed on all generated scenes

weekly.name: Weekly
weekly.description: A short-run option for trying a scene set or a single concept.
features: Enough credits for a full scene set
Watermark removed on every generated scene

monthly.name: Monthly
monthly.description: The best fit for building a steady visual story month after month.
features: Room for several scene sets every month
Watermark removed on every generated scene

yearly.name: Yearly
yearly.description: Serial creators publishing across the year — best per-credit value.
features: Most credits per dollar for high-volume creators
Watermark removed on every generated scene

testimonials.title: Success Stories from Vibe Coders
testimonials.subtitle: Creators, brands and everyday photographers sharing how they ship cinematic scene albums with SceneSelf.

items.name: Alex Chen
items.quote: I shot an entire seasonal lookbook with SceneSelf in one afternoon. No studio, no model fee, no reshoots.

items.name: Jordan Lee
items.quote: Spent years learning to code. Now my non-technical co-founder ships features faster than me using Vibe Coding. This is the future.

items.name: Alice Johnson
items.quote: Our brand campaign would have cost five figures. SceneSelf delivered the same cinematic feel for the price of a coffee.

items.name: Bob Smith
items.quote: I generated 30 scene variants this month alone. SceneSelf is my secret weapon for daily content.

items.name: Cathy Lee
items.quote: I pick a scene, upload a selfie, and the album is done. Shipping content has never been this fast.

items.name: David Wright
items.quote: The authentication, payments, and deployment just work. I focus on unique features. My SaaS was profitable week one.

items.name: Eva Green
items.quote: The efficiency it brings is unmatched. It's a vital tool that has helped us cut costs and improve our end product significantly.

items.name: Frank Moore
items.quote: A robust solution that fits perfectly into our workflow. It has enhanced our team's capabilities and allowed us to tackle more complex projects.

items.name: Grace Hall
items.quote: It's incredibly intuitive and easy to use. Even those without technical expertise can leverage its power to improve their workflows.

items.name: Henry Ford
items.quote: It has saved us countless hours. Highly recommended for anyone looking to enhance their efficiency and productivity.

items.name: Ivy Wilson
items.quote: A must-have tool for any professional. It's revolutionized the way we approach problem-solving and decision-making.

items.name: Jack Brown
items.quote: The results are always impressive. This AI has helped us to not only meet but exceed our performance targets.

items.name: Kathy Adams
items.quote: It helps us achieve what was once thought impossible. The AI's capabilities are groundbreaking and have opened new avenues for us.

items.name: Leo Carter
items.quote: Transformative technology with real impact. It has streamlined our operations and brought unprecedented efficiency to our processes.

items.name: Mia Turner
items.quote: It's simply revolutionary! The way it integrates with our existing systems and enhances them is nothing short of miraculous.

companies.title: Built with Industry-Leading Technologies
companies.subtitle: Built on modern stack trusted by the world's best teams

aiReady.title: AI-Ready Architecture
aiReady.description: Pre-configured AI workflows for chat, image, and video generation, powered by Volcano Engine by default.

creem.title: Creem Payments
creem.description: Complete billing system with subscriptions, usage tracking, and customer portal built-in.

auth.title: Authentication System
auth.description: Better Auth with email/password and OAuth. Session management and protected routes ready.

deploy.title: One-Click Deploy
deploy.description: Deploy to Vercel, Railway, or any platform instantly. Production-ready from day one.

typescript.title: TypeScript + Tailwind
typescript.description: Modern tech stack with Next.js 14, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and shadcn/ui components.

database.title: Database + ORM
database.description: PostgreSQL with Drizzle ORM. Type-safe queries and migrations configured.

seo.title: SEO & Marketing
seo.description: Meta tags, Open Graph, sitemap, and analytics. Everything for organic growth.

vibeCoding.title: Vibe Coding Ready
vibeCoding.description: Optimized for Cursor, Windsurf, and Claude Code. AI understands every component.

cta.title: Ready to Ship Your AI SaaS?
cta.description: Join thousands of creators who ship cinematic scene albums with SceneSelf.
